message:
bd-3u8: implement schema extraction from Model definitions

- Add ModelSchema extension trait with table_schema() method
- Add expected module with schema extraction functions
- Implement table_schema_from_model() and table_schema_from_fields()
- Add ModelTuple trait for aggregating schemas from multiple models
- Add normalize_sql_type() for dialect-specific type comparison
- Export introspection types from lib.rs for downstream use
- Comprehensive unit tests for all functionality

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
